title: Segfault in SQL
poc: SELECT hired, count(*)  FROM voyages WHERE   true  AND hired IS NOT NULL AND hired is not null GROUP BY hired ORDER BY hired;
key_bug_features: GROUP BY with NULL handling in SQL query
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE voyages (hired INT, destination VARCHAR(100), departure_date DATE, passengers INT CHECK (passengers >= 0));
INSERT INTO voyages (hired, destination, departure_date, passengers) VALUES (NULL, 'Paris', '2023-10-01', 10);
INSERT INTO voyages (hired, destination, departure_date, passengers) VALUES (5, 'London', '2023-10-05', 20);
INSERT INTO voyages (hired, destination, departure_date, passengers) VALUES (NULL, 'Berlin', '2023-10-10', 15);
SELECT hired, COUNT(*) FROM voyages WHERE hired IS NOT NULL GROUP BY hired ORDER BY hired;
